---
name: Lesson
about: A universal, protocol-level insight from a fablish run
title: "[lesson] <one-line summary>"
labels: lesson
---

## Summary

One sentence: the insight, phrased as a rule the skill could adopt.

## Evidence

What actually happened that produced this insight. Label each claim
VERIFIED (executed and observed) / REASONED (inferred from something
read) / ASSUMED (unchecked). Include commands and output where they
carry the point.

## Why it generalizes

Why this holds beyond the project it was learned in. If it only holds
for one repo, stack, or team, it belongs in that project's CLAUDE.md or
knowledge base — not here.

## Scope check

- [ ] Not project-specific (would apply in an unrelated repo)
- [ ] Not mutable state (versions, branches, what is currently installed)
- [ ] Not already covered by SKILL.md or references/
- [ ] One insight only (file a separate issue for a second one)
- [ ] User approved the exact issue title and body before filing (no
  confidential project content)

## Proposed change (optional)

The SKILL.md or references/ section this would amend, and suggested
wording.
